manifest.license: User-authored notes and numeric features only. Do not paste copyrighted articles.

manifest.name: Stockfish official project and UCI documentation
manifest.license: GPL-3.0-or-later for the engine; executable is configured locally and not bundled here.
manifest.notes: Used as a local teacher/baseline through UCI for normal 2D chess and derived engine-analysis features.

manifest.name: Lichess open chess database
manifest.license: Lichess database pages list standard rated games as CC0; broadcasts are CC BY-SA 4.0. User must keep source class separated when importing.
manifest.notes: Use only user-downloaded local PGN files to build derived opening statistics.

manifest.name: lichess-org/chess-openings
manifest.license: CC0-1.0 according to the project repository.
manifest.notes: Opening names/facts can annotate local opening books, but move statistics still come from local PGN/engine data.

manifest.name: Local Syzygy tablebases
manifest.license: User-provided local tablebase files; not bundled or redistributed.
manifest.notes: Use for exact chess endgame probing when available and piece count is within the configured tablebase limit.

manifest.name: KataGo official project
manifest.license: Open-source project; executable and neural net are configured locally and not bundled by this repository.
manifest.notes: Use as a local Go teacher/baseline through GTP or analysis JSON for normal boards and derived features.

manifest.name: CWI Database of Go Games
manifest.license: Public web collection; redistribution rights must be checked by the user before bundling any SGF files.
manifest.notes: Metadata-only source. User may place locally approved SGF files in data/go/sgf for derived joseki/fuseki stats.

manifest.name: Edax Reversi official project
manifest.license: GPL-2.0-or-later according to the project license text; executable is configured locally and not bundled here.
manifest.notes: Use as a local Reversi teacher/baseline for normal 8x8 boards and derived engine-analysis features.

manifest.name: French Othello Federation WTHOR database
manifest.license: User must verify terms before redistribution; this repository stores only derived statistics.
manifest.notes: Use locally downloaded WTHOR files to derive Reversi opening statistics.

manifest.name: PettingZoo Chinese Checkers environment
manifest.license: Check repository license before bundling code. Use as a research reference and optional local environment.
manifest.notes: Reference for multi-agent Chinese Checkers training with chaining jumps and parameter sharing.

manifest.name: Zedrichu Chinese Checkers minimax reference
manifest.license: Check repository license before bundling code. Use only if local copy is approved.
manifest.notes: Reference for two-player minimax-style Chinese Checkers ideas.

manifest.name: Topoboardgame local strategy notes
manifest.license: User-authored derived feature notes for this repository.
manifest.notes: Compact feature rules only; do not paste copyrighted strategy article text here.

rules.description: Opening play prefers central pawn control, fast minor-piece development, king safety, and avoiding repeated piece moves before development is complete.
Increase move scores that preserve castling rights, complete kingside development, and reduce early queen exposure unless tactics are concrete.
Middlegame search emphasizes king pressure, forcing moves, piece activity, pawn breaks, and conversion of static advantages into active threats.
Endgame play values active king position, passed pawn creation, opposition-like distance features, rook activity, and exact tablebase results when available.

decisionStack: endgame: Syzygy if LOCAL_SYZYGY_PATH exists and piece count <= 7; else Stockfish/local search
